FLOW.COMMENT: fwAdvanceWorkflowStep - advance the workflow's current step to its next step

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: updateActiveSenderReceiverAliases - update the sender/receiver info in TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE
Note that both newsender and newreceiver aliases are optional, but at least one must be supplied

BRANCH.COMMENT: if they supply neither, then fail

INVOKE.NAME: sSqlFrag==''
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0000 Please provide sender and/or receiver aliases as input

Values.value: FE0000 Please provide sender and/or receiver aliases as input
